# keyword-test-app

## Usage

```bash
myapp serve
```

## Memory Usage

This section documents how much memory the app uses.
Typically around 512MB under load.

## Development

```bash
npm run dev
```

## API Specification

This documents the OpenAPI spec for the REST endpoints.

## Docker

```bash
docker compose up -d
```

## Available Scripts

```bash
npm run lint
npm run format
```

## How to Install

```bash
pip install keyword-app
```

## Compilation

```bash
make all
```

## Deployment

```bash
kubectl apply -f deploy.yaml
```

## Dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

## Make Targets

```bash
make clean
make build
```
